description: Multi-turn: write a metric via CLI -> query to verify (covers `neomind device write-metric`; this is a separate write path from webhook-telemetry).

turns.user: Use the CLI to write a values.battery metric to sensor-001 with value 88.
Check sensor-001's latest value to confirm 88 was persisted.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind device write-metric sensor-001 --metric values.battery --value 88` (or POST /api/devices/sensor-001/metrics)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind device get sensor-001` (or device latest) and references 88 from the previous turn
expectations.overall: Turn 2 must actually read 88 (or a very close float)
